name: American International Group, Inc.
h1: American International's GCC footprint in India
lede: American International runs three capability centers across three Indian cities. Bengaluru, Gurugram and Chennai, covering CoE and it, built over seventeen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one American International office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: American International GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: American International runs 3 verified GCC centers across 3 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Gurugram, Chennai), covering CoE and it. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: American International's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Gurugram and Chennai, spanning CoE and it. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting and Procurement for the group's global operations.
about.headquarters: New York, New York, United States

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all seven decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does American International operate in India?
faq.a: American International operates 3 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does American International have GCC centers in?
faq.a: American International's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru, Gurugram and Chennai.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does American International run in India?
faq.a: American International runs CoE and it centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at American International's India GCCs?
faq.a: American International's India centers employ in the 501 to 1,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads American International's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 7 leaders at American International's India centers, across Finance, IT and HR. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
